name: Anew Start Solutions
description_short: Anew Start Solutions is a credit repair company established in 2009 that disputes errors on credit reports and offers credit-building tools to help clients achieve pre-approvable credit status.
description_long:
Anew Start Solutions, LLC was founded in 2009 and is led by the owner known as "Credit Christy" among clients and affiliates. The company employs licensed credit specialists and positions itself as a full-service credit improvement firm dedicated to helping individuals who have experienced credit denials. The company's mission extends beyond transactional services to include education and long-term financial empowerment for its clients.

The company's core service is credit repair through customized dispute processes targeting inaccurate, outdated, and unverifiable items on credit reports, including collections, public records, late payments, and general errors. They also verify and correct personal information like name, address, and employer details. Beyond disputes, Anew Start offers credit-building products including three types of secured credit cards, rental reporting services, self-lending accounts, and a card designed to teach children about credit management. The company provides supplementary services such as detailed credit file reviews, budget assistance, and ongoing credit education.

Anew Start distinguishes itself through its emphasis on concurrent credit building and dispute resolution—addressing negative items while simultaneously establishing positive credit history to accelerate creditworthiness. The company highlights personalized service, with the owner directly involved in client relations and satisfaction. Client testimonials reference reasonable fees, tangible results (specific score improvements from "good" to "great"), and successful outcomes like mortgage qualification. The company's marketing emphasizes education and empowerment rather than guarantees.

The company operates within the credit repair industry, which carries inherent limitations and regulatory constraints. While the website avoids making illegal guarantees, credit repair outcomes depend heavily on the validity of disputes and individual credit circumstances. The company's pricing is mentioned as "reasonable" but specific costs are not disclosed on the public-facing website. Service quality and results will vary based on the complexity of each client's credit situation and the responsiveness of credit bureaus to disputes.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers three types of secured credit cards plus rental reporting and self-lending accounts for concurrent credit building
Licensed credit specialists on staff (vs. unlicensed operators)
Established since 2009 with verifiable track record and named owner leadership
Provides supplementary services including budget assistance and credit education, not just disputes
Multiple client testimonials with specific positive outcomes (score improvements, mortgage qualification)
Addresses personal information accuracy (name, address, employer) not just negative items
Personalizes credit plans to individual goals rather than one-size-fits-all approach
cons: Specific pricing and fee structure are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact
No mention of legal safeguards, compliance certifications, or regulatory disclosures (ROSCA, CROA compliance statements absent)
Cannot guarantee removal of accurate negative items; success depends on dispute validity and bureau response times
No mention of credit monitoring or ongoing score tracking services to monitor dispute results
Website testimonials are limited in number and lack verifiable third-party review sources
best_for: Individuals with mixed credit files containing errors, inaccuracies, or outdated negative items who need structured dispute support
People rebuilding credit after collection accounts or late payments who want concurrent credit-building tools
Consumers seeking personalized guidance and education alongside dispute services, not just automated dispute processing
First-time credit repair clients who prefer working with a named owner and licensed specialists
diagnosis: Anew Start Solutions is best suited for consumers with legitimate errors or outdated negative items on their credit reports who want hands-on service from licensed specialists and concurrent credit-building support. The main caveat is that credit repair success depends on dispute validity—the company cannot remove accurate negative information, and results timelines are subject to credit bureau processing, which typically takes 30-45 days per dispute cycle.
services: Customized credit dispute process for inaccurate and unverifiable negative items
Public records error correction and removal
Personal information verification and correction (name, address, employer)
Secured credit card offerings (three types available)
Rental reporting services to build credit history
Ongoing credit education and creditworthiness training
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
